notes: Reviewed replacement candidates for the daily maintenance job.
Do not add piracy playlists, paid TV links, protected API links, tokenized links, fake headers, cookies, DRM bypasses, or private app endpoints.
Candidates must include evidence_url and notes before tools/check_channels.py can add them as lower-priority fallbacks.

reshet13.notes: Source type: DIRECT_HLS. Official-page candidate extracted from the public Reshet 13 live page on 2026-06-19. Keep as a lower-priority fallback until a network-enabled maintenance run can verify playback.
